nasb.text: You shall betroth a wife, but another man will violate her; you shall build a house, but you will not live in it; you shall plant a vineyard, but you will not use its fruit.

esv.text: You shall betroth a wife, but another man shall ravish her. You shall build a house, but you shall not dwell in it. You shall plant a vineyard, but you shall not enjoy its fruit.

cnv.text: 你和女子訂了婚，別人必和她同寢；你建造房屋，必不得住在裡面；你栽種葡萄園，必不得享用它的果子。

ccb.text: “你们聘了妻子，别人必占有她；你们盖了房屋，必不能住在里面；你们栽种葡萄园，必吃不到园中的出产。
